items.name: tokens-base
items.title: Base Tokens
items.description: Primitive values (colors, spacing, radius, typography, shadows, motion). Always install this first — it is the foundation of the entire system.

items.name: tokens-semantic
items.title: Semantic Tokens
items.description: Semantic token layer that maps primitives to meaning (brand, surface, text, border, status). Install after tokens-base. Brand themes override these slots.

items.name: theme-example
items.title: Theme: Example Brand
items.description: Starter brand theme. Duplicate this file and rename it theme-[your-brand].css to create a new brand. Override the semantic slots with your brand values.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Form input field with label, hint text, and validation states. Variants: default, error, success. Sizes: sm, md, lg. Supports textarea, required, disabled, readonly. Available as input.astro and input.tsx (React).

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Flexible container component with optional header, body, footer, and media slots. Variants: default, outlined, ghost, elevated. Supports interactive hover states and href for clickable cards. React version exports sub-components: CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardBody, CardFooter, CardMedia.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Inline label for status, categories, or metadata. Variants: default, primary, secondary, success, warning, error, info. Styles: solid, subtle, outline. Sizes: sm, md, lg. Supports dot indicator.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Base button component. Variants: primary, secondary, ghost, danger. Sizes: sm, md, lg. Supports href (renders as <a>), loading state, icon-only, and full-width. Available as button.astro and button.tsx (React).
